title: wicked domain-model (v1.0.0)
description: Canonical, GENERIC, config-driven domain model — the shared spine of the wicked domain-brain effort (estate GROUNDS, brain EQUIPS, garden STEERS, crew GOVERNS). Successor to anti-legacy's requirements-graph.enriched.schema.json with the COBOL/CICS-specific vocabulary genericized: miner kind-sets live in config.coverage.* (NOT hardcoded here), provenance is {source, ref, source_kinds} (not {source_app, program, ...}), and source_kinds uses the generic 'type-def' tier (not COBOL 'data-def'). HARD INVARIANTS preserved from the donor: every requirement carries the full field set; business_rules has minItems 1; every business rule carries a numeric confidence in [0,1] AND a provenance{source, ref, source_kinds}; disposition is keep|modify|drop|new; a 'drop' needs a disposition_reason to be honored by the coverage gate. Rule/Validation/ErrorPath items are OBJECT-ONLY (the transitional string form is not accepted). IDs are RULE-/VAL-/ERR- + 3-to-6-digit zero-padded, unique within a requirement; the canonical global key is legacy_component + '#' + id. A domain fact REFERENCES an estate SymbolId (in legacy_components / provenance.ref) and never embeds a copy of the symbol's code, name-uniqueness, file, or line. Every emitted document MUST carry metadata.schema_version = '1.0.0'; a consumer rejects a schema_version it has no validator for.

provenance.description: Where a fact came from and how it is grounded. Generalized from the donor's {source_app, program, ref, source_kinds} to a repo/service-agnostic shape.

source.description: The origin unit the fact came from — repo / service / module (replaces COBOL source_app + program).

ref.description: The specific reference within the source — file#anchor, symbol, or an estate SymbolId. A REFERENCE, never a copy of the symbol's structure.

source_kinds.description: The grounding tier of each fact. Generic enum (adapted from the donor SOURCE-KINDs): code-body = executable logic read directly; type-def = type/schema/struct/interface/DB-schema declaration (generalizes COBOL data-def); comment = inline prose; doc = README/external. TRUST RULE: a rule is 'trusted' only when grounded in code-body and/or type-def; resting on comment/doc alone makes it RISK-eligible.

rule.description: A single business rule. OBJECT-ONLY in v1.0.0. HARD INVARIANT (ISS-11): confidence is a REQUIRED number in [0,1] and provenance is REQUIRED — a confidence-less, non-numeric-confidence, or provenance-less rule is a hard validation failure, not a warning.

validation.description: A single validation. OBJECT-ONLY. confidence and provenance stay OPTIONAL here (unlike business rules). error_ref is the intra-requirement join to an ErrorPath id (the round-trip check).

errorPath.description: A single error path. OBJECT-ONLY. confidence and provenance stay OPTIONAL. code is the return/status code surfaced.

legacy_components.description: SYNONYM CLARIFICATION: `legacy_components` and `source_components` name the SAME concept — the estate SymbolIds / node names this requirement covers. v1.0.0 keeps the wire key `legacy_components` for zero-churn porting from the anti-legacy donor; `source_components` is the preferred name in prose and future majors. A conformant emitter writes the key `legacy_components`; a consumer that also accepts `source_components` MUST treat it as identical. Non-null, never dropped (may be empty but the key is always present). Each entry SHOULD resolve to an estate node name or SymbolId — a REFERENCE, not a copy of the symbol's code/file/line.

data_access.description: Data resources touched — table / collection / store names (generic; was DB2/IMS).

business_rules.description: HARD INVARIANT: minItems 1. A requirement with zero rules is a placeholder — mark status 'unresolvable' with a reason instead.

disposition.description: HARD INVARIANT. Merge+reimagine disposition of this requirement relative to the target state. A 'drop' WITH a disposition_reason is excluded from the round-trip rule-coverage gate; a 'drop' WITHOUT a reason is NOT honored and still counts against coverage.

disposition_reason.description: Why this requirement carries its disposition. MANDATORY for 'drop' to be honored by the coverage gate — a reason-less drop cannot launder past GATE_3. Enforced by an if/then conditional on this object: disposition == 'drop' requires a non-empty disposition_reason.

description.description: Human label for the domain (new, generic).

cluster_id.description: The estate Louvain community index this domain was derived from. Advisory provenance only — NOT authoritative.

schema_version.description: The bundle semver. Every emitted document MUST carry this; a consumer rejects a schema_version it has no validator for (no silent best-effort).

source.description: The repo/service the model was mined from (optional).

domains.description: REQUIRED. Keys are domain slugs; each value is a Domain.
